programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller with Simu Liu. Hunted by his own agency, and with his body betraying him, can Alexander stay alive long enough to save those he loves the most.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Series finale of the spy thriller. As Alexander races against the clock, Parker discovers a secret message hiding in plain sight..

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George visits a handsome, turn-of-the-century terrace home, whose new owners are set on a monochrome colour scheme, and a workshop that makes antique-effect mirrors.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers meet all the colourful characters involved in race day at Hexham's scenic racecourse. And Janice gets involved in training dogs with the emergency services.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Financial pressures mount for Amanda and Nick at their Spanish guesthouse. And can Colin and Helen drum up more bookings in Portugal.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon reaches a big milestone with his health. But with the garden wall still not finished and Jasmine getting called away for a job, it's all work and no play for Jon.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mette and Chris from Brighton have £220,000 to spend on a holiday home to enjoy with their two children on Mallorca's north coast. Scarlette Douglas lines up five fantastic options.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Jan and Chris look for a dream holiday home in Almería, Spain. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for £150k that works for both of their families.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie's unfinished apartment gets their hearts racing as their decadent Valentine's event approaches. Mark and Sandra juggle a gîte renovation and tractor lessons.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back on some clever builds. In Surrey, Pippa's sick of her 'tatty little bungalow'. Can Kirstie help her fall back in love with her home.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hotel duty manager Andrew welcomes his guests to a hotel-themed night, with 'five-star' food including 'early reservation fishcakes' and a 'do not disturb truffle'.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, cocky fitness fanatic Jonny plans a meaty menu. And his guests get to see more of him than they bargained for..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sheepdog trainer Katy divides opinion with her prawns cooked on an open fire and her potent home-made horseradish sauce. But her shepherding demonstration is a hit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Holly shows her love of her county by serving Cumbrian scallops and chorizo followed by Cumberland sausage. But her Penrith fudge pudding is too much for some.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition, estate agent Wendy organises a Friday night disco with some surprises for her guests.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Herne Bay, Leezac hopes to create a modern home on a modest budget, but a steel beam's causing problems. Alice hits a brick wall with her Somerset townhouse.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith and Marj transform two dark storerooms into a guest suite with a courtyard, complete with a fire trench, night lights and a canopy honouring Pwllheli's maritime heritage.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers check out all the best TV from early 2025 in this special episode.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. In his first mission, Gordon spies on a family-run Greek eatery that's gone downhill.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can Gordon change owner Patrick's toxic ways to save his business - and his marriage.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hair stylist meets a nutritionist with a bit of 'swag'. A conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher who also wrestles. And an opera singer serenades his date.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Brendon and Priya want to explore Priya's bisexuality - will a steamy hot tub hit the spot? Chelsea and George disagree over how far they should take things.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George is out and about with his sledgehammer, knocking holes in a fake Tudor ceiling in Leamington Spa and moving doors in a farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: Matt Baker, his mum Janice and his dad Mike are hitting the road again for adventures in the beautiful north of England. First stop: the magical Lindisfarne.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: After finishing their gîte renovation, Kimmie and Matt hope for a busy summer of bookings. And can Mike and Craig's café take the heat of a second season.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: It's the final push, as the family's big summer bash is almost upon them. With guests about to arrive, can they gather momentum and complete everything in time.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Dorset couple Andy and Barbara find their perfect holiday home in Benidorm. After a health scare for Andy, they've chosen to seize the moment and buy a bolthole in Spain.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carpenter David from Suffolk wants an apartment near the beach in Abruzzo on Italy's east coast. Craig Rowe shows him what his £45,000 can buy.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB race to light up their red salon before a drinks party. Anna and Edward rebuild their lake's sweeping stairway. Christina and Sassan transform their grand front gates.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: A look back at Kris and Emily's crammed three-bed in Somersham and Kirstie's biggest-ever declutter. How did the hoarders on the Cambridgeshire borders get on.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sports enthusiast James serves up a French and Italian feast. His soup confuses his guests, who discover that there's more to James than meets the eye..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous Donna spends nearly as much time fixing her make-up as she does cooking her cosy comfort food, on a night when a secret stash reveals the host's hidden side.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time actor Caroline takes the spotlight with a travel-inspired menu. But the night gets off to a shaky start when Donna finds a hair in her salad.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Barb hopes to impress her guests with an Australian menu. But Barb, Donna and Caroline all end up in tears.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman and keen cricketer Duncan plans to 'sell' his evening to his 'customers'. But how will his spicy reindeer curry go down with his guests.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to level up from dog sitting to a dog of her own. Could a cheeky Yorkie be the one? And will ex-cabbie Danny give Bella the Border collie a lift.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: A journey to discover the world's most extraordinary hotels, including a brutalist lodge in Bolivia, a mirrored resort on a Norwegian fjord and an art deco hotel in the Pyrenees.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Sir Robert, who's 93, is rushed to St George's with a low heart rate. Brad, who's crushed his finger at work, talks about what masculinity means to him and male role models.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In East Anglia, a seriously ill dialysis patient desperately needs fluids. And on Canvey Island, the medics take over the breathing of a motorcyclist who's bleeding from his ear.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time the celebs watch Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise and Millionaire Hoarders.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Brendon and Priya want to explore Priya's bisexuality - will a steamy hot tub hit the spot? Chelsea and George disagree over how far they should take things.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hair stylist meets a nutritionist with a bit of 'swag'. A conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher who also wrestles. And an opera singer serenades his date.
